## Summary

Adds a dedicated forensic pipeline map for **long-form evaluations** (≥25K words) at `docs/forensics/LONG_FORM_FORENSIC_PIPELINE_MAP.md`. This is NOT an extension of the short-form Sister map — it traces the completely different path that long-form manuscripts take through the system.

The map identifies **10 stages where long-form diverges from short-form**, with full input/output/gate/mutation/ownership documentation at each divergence. Key finding: 3 gates are completely MISSING from the long-form path, and 2 existing gates have insufficient coverage.

## Scope

- [ ] Pass 1
- [ ] Pass 2
- [ ] Pass 3

Changed files:

- `docs/forensics/LONG_FORM_FORENSIC_PIPELINE_MAP.md` (new — 492 lines)

Out of scope:

- Short-form pipeline (covered by existing SISTER_FORENSIC_PIPELINE_MAP.md)
- Code changes (this is documentation/forensics only)
- Implementation of missing gates (separate PRs)
